## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (code improvement without behavior change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (README, wiki, comments)
- [ ] 💅 Style (formatting, linting, no logic change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (improvement without behavior change)
- [ ] 🔐 Security (fix or hardening)

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe how you tested the changes:
- [ ] Windows 11
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] No console errors (F12 DevTools)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots or screen recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (TypeScript, no `any` without reason)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have tested this on both Windows 11 and macOS (if applicable)

## Additional Notes
Any additional context, decisions, or notes about this change.
